ATTY. HAROLD MCELHINNY, TEL. NO. 1-415-866-7225 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT TOSHIBA;
ATTY. JACK W. LONDEN OF MORRISON & FOESTER, TEL. NO. 1-415-268-7415 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT TOSHIBA.

RULING - The court started with a proposal and see if Toshiba can agree that it would give two weeks or some other period of time notice before it closed any deal to transfer interest in the parties 'JV, Joint venture. The court heard arguments on its proposal and ruled as follows: PLAINTIFFS SANDISK LLC, SANDISK (CAYMAN) LIMITED, SANDISK (IRELAND) LIMITED and SANDISK FLASH B.V.'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction is continued to July 28, 2017 at 1:30 p.m. in Dept. 302 to be heard with Case Number 559962. The parties to exchange draft in the form of a stipulated order and in the interim there shall be no closing or transfer of interest.
